overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand gothic dining hall reminiscent of a wizarding school, featuring floating candle chandeliers, long wooden house tables filled with students, and towering stained glass windows. The camera maintains a steady elevated perspective from a stone balcony overlooking the entire hall, with warm candlelight contrasting against the cool blue night visible through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and house dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation from an elevated stone balcony overlooking the grand dining hall and its occupants

notable_agents.action: figures in white robes walking slowly down the central aisle between the dining tables

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air providing warm golden illumination throughout the hall
rows of wooden house tables arranged lengthwise, filled with seated students and dining ware
towering gothic arched windows with intricate blue glass patterns showing the night sky outside
ornate carved stone balustrade in the immediate foreground indicating the camera's elevated vantage point
large burning brazier or fireplace with visible flames along the right wall
decorative hanging banners between stone arches on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady elevated view of a magnificent gothic dining hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Students fill the long wooden house tables below, while figures in white robes walk the central aisle. The warm candlelight contrasts with the cool blue glow from the tall stained glass windows on the right, and a large fire pit burns steadily along the wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady elevated perspective over a magnificent gothic dining hall, capturing the interplay between warm interior light and the cool night outside. It begins with a wide view of the grand space, where thousands of floating candles cast a golden glow over students seated at long wooden house tables. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts toward the central aisle where figures in white robes move steadily through the hall. The scene then emphasizes the atmospheric contrast between the burning fire pit along the wall and the deep blue light filtering through the towering stained glass windows.
